caption.text: Three points of hell forged into one weapon.Power. Precision. Pain.This is the Devil’s Trident—built to tear through weakness and leave nothing but strength behind.#devilstrident #warriortraining #dadstrength #liveforit #fitover40 #kettlebellflow #armyofdad #functionalstrength #strengthtraining #liveforit

caption.text: In case you need a reminder. It may feel like the world is on fire all around you. You can’t see an end in sight. What do we do? Quit? Give up? Lay down? Absolutely not! We push through the hard times because that’s what successful people do. This is what winners do. We keep going. We keep our goals in the front of our minds and drown out the outside influences. We are relentless! #iam1stphom #1stphorm #wedothework #legionofboom #relentless #mfceo #realaf #goals #winning #winningmindset

caption.text:
Leg day chipper from hell 🔥💀

A “chipper” workout means you complete all reps of one exercise before moving to the next.

Workout (20 min cap):

• 50 Goblet Squat to Lunge (Alt) 
• 50 Goblet Back Lunge (Alt) 
• 100 Bodyweight Lunges (Alt)

Simple on paper.

Absolutely disrespectful in real life.

The key here is pacing. If you attack the first 50 reps too aggressively, the final 100 bodyweight lunges are going to humble you quickly.

Stay steady. Stay upright. Keep moving.

This one is all grit.

📲 Want more follow-along sessions? 300+ kettlebell workouts + full programs inside the KBMH app. Drop “APP” in the comments and I’ll send you the link.

#LegDay #KettlebellWorkout #Conditioning #FunctionalFitness #LiveForIt

caption.text:
Day 3/30

It’s already uncomfortable. 
Good.

That’s the point.

Nobody changes staying comfortable.

100 Tactical Transfers every day isn’t supposed to feel easy. 
It’s supposed to challenge your discipline, your consistency, and your ability to keep showing up when your body starts talking back.

That discomfort?

That’s growth.

Keep going.

Check in: 3/30

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#30DayChallenge #Discipline #Consistency #MentalToughness #LiveForIt

caption.text:
What good are your muscles if you can’t move the weight?

Introducing the Warrior’s Arc.

You start in a lunge, rotate your body, and arc the kettlebell overhead as you transition into the opposite side.

This isn’t just a strength movement—it’s movement training.

You’re developing:
• Rotational strength
• Overhead stability
• Coordination under load
• Control through transitions

Most people train in straight lines.

But real strength shows up when you can control weight through space, through rotation, and through unstable positions.

That’s what builds an athletic body—not just a strong one.

Take your time with this one. Control matters more than speed.

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you how I’m programming it.

caption.text:
Day 2/30

You chose this.
Act like it.

Nobody forced you into this challenge.

You made the decision—
now it’s on you to follow through.

100 Tactical Transfers. Every day.

No missed days. No half-effort reps.

You don’t build discipline by talking about it…
you build it by showing up and doing the work.

Check in: 2/30

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#30DayChallenge #Discipline #Consistency #MentalToughness #LiveForIt

caption.text:
12-minute overhead stability finisher 🔥

This is an EMOM (Every Minute On the Minute). You start each movement at the top of the minute and use whatever time remains to recover.

Workout:

min 1: 40 sec Overhead March (L)
min 2: 40 sec Windmills (L)
min 3: 40 sec Overhead March (R)
min 4: 40 sec Windmills (R)

Repeat for 3 total rounds.

This is all about shoulder stability, control, and core engagement under load.

If your positioning breaks… you’ll feel it immediately.

Keep your eyes on the bell.
Lock the elbow.
Move with control.

This isn’t a speed workout—it’s a precision test.

📲 Want more follow-along sessions? 300+ kettlebell workouts + full programs inside the KBMH app. Drop “APP” in the comments and I’ll send you the link.

#kettlebelltraining #shoulderstrength #emomworkout #functionalfitness #LiveForIt

caption.text:
Most people train their abs.

Very few actually train their core.

There’s a difference.

Your core’s job isn’t just to flex—it’s to stabilize, rotate, and resist movement under load.

That’s where strength comes from.

This sequence hits all of it:

• Bear Plank Side Drag
• Bear Plank Saw Drag
• Bear Plank Touches
• Underhand Kneeling Chops
• Deadstop Halos

If you’re not shaking during these… you’re either rushing them or going too light.

Slow it down. Stay tight. Control every rep.

That’s how you build a core that actually performs—not just looks good.

Comment CORE and I’ll send you how I’m structuring this.

#CoreStrength #FunctionalTraining #KettlebellTraining #Stability #LiveForIt

caption.text:
Day 1/30

Start it.
No backing out.

New challenge:

100 Tactical Transfers. Every single day for 30 days.

Simple. Not easy.

This is about discipline.
This is about showing up when you don’t feel like it.
This is about building something you can actually carry forward.

No missed days. No excuses.

You start this… you finish it.

Check in: 1/30

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#30DayChallenge #Discipline #Consistency #MentalToughness #LiveForIt

caption.text:
50-minute full-body EMOM 🔥

This is a long grind—but structured the right way.

EMOM means Every Minute On the Minute.
You start each movement at the top of the minute and use the remaining time to recover.

Workout:

min 1: 8–12 Goblet Clean Squat
min 2: 12–16 Goblet Back Lunge (Alt)
min 3: 8–12 Goblet Thruster
min 4: 8–12 Gunslinger (L)
min 5: 8–12 Gunslinger (R)
min 6: 8–12 Bent Row (Alt)
min 7: 8–12 Squatted Curl
min 8: 8–12 Upright Row
min 9: 40 Mountain Climbers
min 10: Rest

Repeat for 5 total rounds.

The goal here isn’t to sprint—it’s to stay consistent from the first round to the last.

If you come out too hot, you won’t survive it.

Stay controlled. Stay moving. Finish strong.

📲 Want more follow-along sessions? 300+ kettlebell workouts + full programs inside the KBMH app. Drop “APP” in the comments and I’ll send you the link.

#kettlebelltraining #emom #conditioningworkout #fullbodytraining #LiveForIt

caption.text:
Most people think these 30-day challenges are about building muscle.

And sure… that happens.

But that’s not the real point.

The real point is discipline.

It’s showing up when it’s inconvenient.
When it’s boring.
When you don’t feel like it.

It’s building the ability to commit to something…
and actually see it all the way through.

That’s what changes you.

That’s what carries over into every area of your life.

The physical results are just a byproduct.

New challenge drops tonight.

Comment STRUCTURE and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#Discipline #Consistency #MentalToughness #30DayChallenge #LiveForIt

caption.text:
Day 30/30

You did the work.
Now carry it forward.

This wasn’t just a challenge—
it was a standard.

You showed up when it was hard.
You stayed consistent when it would’ve been easy to quit.
You built something most people never do.

Now the real question is…

What happens next?

Because this version of you doesn’t stop at 30 days.

100 reps. Every day.

Carry it forward.

Final check in: 30/30

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#30DayChallenge #Discipline #Consistency #MentalToughness #LiveForIt

caption.text:
Day 30/30

You did the work.
Now carry it forward.

This wasn’t just a challenge—
it was a standard.

You showed up when it was hard.
You stayed consistent when it would’ve been easy to quit.
You built something most people never do.

Now the real question is…

What happens next?

Because this version of you doesn’t stop at 30 days.

100 reps. Every day.

Carry it forward.

Final check in: 30/30

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#30DayChallenge #Discipline #Consistency #MentalToughness #LiveForIt

caption.text:
40-minute core beatdown 🔥

This is an EMOM (Every Minute On the Minute), meaning you begin each movement at the start of the minute and use whatever time remains to recover.

Workout:

min 1: 12–16 Kettlebell Halos (Alt)
min 2: 8–12 Turkish Situps (L)
min 3: 8–12 Turkish Situps (R)
min 4: 10–14 Goblet Situp Press
min 5: 35 sec Suitcase Hold (L)
min 6: 35 sec Suitcase Hold (R)
min 7: 12–16 Figure 8
min 8: 10–14 Plank Side Drag (Alt)

Repeat for 5 total rounds.

This is more than just abs.

You’re training:
– Rotation
– Anti-rotation
– Stability under load
– Endurance through fatigue

By the later rounds, it becomes less about reps…
and more about holding position and not breaking.

That’s real core strength.

📲 Want more follow-along sessions? 300+ kettlebell workouts + full programs inside the KBMH app. Drop “APP” in the comments and I’ll send you the link.

#kettlebelltraining #corestrength #emomworkout #functionalfitness #LiveForIt

caption.text:
Day 29/30

One more push.
Empty the tank.

You’ve come too far to hold anything back now.

This is where you give everything you’ve got—
no pacing, no hesitation.

Leave it all here.

100 reps. Every day.

Finish strong.

Check in: 29/30

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#30DayChallenge #Discipline #Consistency #MentalToughness #LiveForIt

caption.text:
“So you think you’re fit?”

Here’s a quick way to find out.

15 min cap descending ladder:
21-18-15-12-9-6-3

Swing Clean Push Press (Alt)
Russian Swing
Romanian Deadlift
Situps

No built-in rest—just steady movement.

I ran it with 45lbs and finished in 14:07.

This one isn’t about going out hot…
it’s about managing pace and not falling apart halfway through.

Looks simple. Feels different.

Comment MOVES if you want to give it a shot.

#kettlebelltraining #conditioningworkout #fitnesschallenge #mentalgrit #LiveForIt  Kettlebell Workouts by KBMH

caption.text:
Rotation is the missing piece for most people.

Everyone wants aesthetics…
but they’re training like robots—straight up and down.

This combo changes that:

Squat → single arm curl → twisting thruster

You’re forcing your body to stabilize, rotate, and produce force all in one movement.

That’s how you build a physique that actually looks athletic—
not just trained.

Control the movement. Don’t rush it.

Rotation is the key.

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#kettlebelltraining #functionalfitness #corestrength #aestheticphysique #LiveForIt

caption.text:
Day 28/30

Finish strong.
No regrets.

You didn’t come this far to coast.
You didn’t build this just to ease up at the end.

This is where you empty the tank.

Every rep matters.
Every set counts.

100 reps. Every day.

Stay in it. Finish what you started.

Check in: 28/30

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#30DayChallenge #Discipline #Consistency #MentalToughness #LiveForIt

caption.text:
20-minute lower body and conditioning grind 🔥

This is an EMOM (Every Minute On the Minute), meaning you start each movement at the top of the minute and use whatever time is left to recover.

Workout:

min 1: 10–14 Cossack Squat (Alt) (total)
min 2: 10–14 Gorilla Swing
min 3: 40 sec Suitcase Deadlift (L)
min 4: 40 sec Suitcase Deadlift (R)
min 5: 40 sec Bodyweight Lunges (Alt) (or rest)

Repeat for 4 total rounds.

This one is all about pacing and control.

Cossacks challenge mobility and stability.
Swings drive power and conditioning.
Suitcase deadlifts build unilateral strength and core stability.

If you go out too fast, it will catch you.
Stay steady and you’ll finish strong.

📲 Want more follow-along sessions? 300+ kettlebell workouts + full programs inside the KBMH app. Drop “APP” in the comments and I’ll send you the link.

#kettlebelltraining #legworkout #emomworkout #functionalfitness #LiveForIt  Kettlebell Workouts by KBMH

caption.text:
Crunches aren’t useless—
they’re just limited.

They train flexion.

But your core’s real job?

Rotation. Stability. Resisting movement. Producing force across angles.

That’s what carries over to everything—
lifting, running, balance, real-world strength.

If you want a core that performs…
you have to train it that way.

Strong core > popping abs.

Comment CORE and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#corestrength #functionalfitness #kettlebelltraining #strengthtraining #LiveForIt

caption.text:
Day 27/30

You’re different now.
Act like it.

You’ve put in the reps.
You’ve built the discipline.
You’ve shown up when it wasn’t easy.

So stop moving like the old version of you.

Move with intent.
Move with confidence.
Move like someone who finishes what they start.

That’s how this is built.

100 reps. Every day.

Stay in it.

Check in: 27/30

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#30DayChallenge #Discipline #Consistency #MentalToughness #LiveForIt

caption.text:
I’m convinced whoever programmed this workout had a personal issue with legs and lungs. 💀

FOR TIME (20 min cap):

“I got 99 problems, but a burpee ain’t one”

33 Burpee Snatch (L)
33 Burpee Snatch (R)
33 Burpees

99 total reps… doesn’t sound bad at first.

Then it hits.

Your heart rate spikes.
Your breathing gets questionable.
And suddenly rep 60 feels like rep 600.

This one is all about pacing and grit.
Go out too fast and it’ll humble you quick.

Just keep moving. That’s the only strategy.

Comment MOVES if you want to try it.

#kettlebelltraining #conditioningworkout #burpees #mentalgrit #LiveForIt  @kbmh.app

caption.text:
🎯 Tactical Crossfire Pull 🎯

This isn’t just a high pull—
this is controlled, multi-directional strength.

Pattern:
Left → Center → Right → Center

Every rep starts from a dead stop.

No momentum.
No shortcuts.

You generate power from nothing—
then control it across angles.

That’s what builds real strength, coordination, and stability.

Reset. Fire. Control. Repeat. 🔥

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#kettlebelltraining #functionalfitness #strengthtraining #corestrength #LiveForIt

caption.text:
Day 26/30

This is discipline.
Live it.

Not something you turn on when you feel like it—
something you carry with you every day.

You’ve built the habit.
Now you protect it.

Show up.
Do the work.
Repeat.

That’s how this is built.

100 reps. Every day.

Stay in it.

Check in: 26/30

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#30DayChallenge #Discipline #Consistency #MentalToughness #LiveForIt

caption.text:
20-minute AMRAP shred fest 🔥

“As Many Rounds As Possible” means you keep cycling through the movements for the full 20 minutes with as little rest as possible.

Workout:

2 Clean Lunge (L)
2 Swing Clean Squat (L)
2 Snatch Lunge (L)
2 Swing Snatch (L)
2 Windmills (L)

Then repeat everything on the right side.
Left + Right = 1 full round.

This is a flow-based grind—
you’re building strength, coordination, and endurance all at once.

The key is pacing.

Go out too fast and it’ll catch you.
Stay steady and you’ll keep moving.

Legs, shoulders, lungs… all tested.

📲 Want more follow-along sessions? 300+ kettlebell workouts + full programs inside the KBMH app. Drop “APP” in the comments and I’ll send you the link.

#kettlebelltraining #amrapworkout #conditioning #fatlossjourney #LiveForIt  Kettlebell Workouts by KBMH

caption.text:
Stop chasing abs.
Start building a core.

Your core isn’t just for how you look—
it’s for how you move.

Rotation. Stability. Power across multiple planes.

That’s what builds real strength.

Not just flexion.
Not just crunches.

But control, resistance, and the ability to produce force.

When your core gets stronger, everything else follows—
your lifts, your balance, your endurance.

That’s the difference.

Comment CORE and I’ll send you the app I use.

#corestrength #functionalfitness #kettlebelltraining #strengthtraining #LiveForIt

caption.text:
Day 25/30

Almost there.
Stay dangerous.

This is where most people start to coast—
when the finish line is close.

Not you.

You push harder here.
You stay sharp.
You finish strong.

That’s how this is built.

100 reps. Every day.

Stay in it.

Check in: 25/30

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#30DayChallenge #Discipline #Consistency #MentalToughness #LiveForIt

caption.text:
Swing Apocalypse #83 💀

350 reps for time.
20-minute cap.
Clocked it at 18:34.

Workout:

50 Russian Swings
50 Swing Clean (L)
50 Russian Swings
50 Swing Clean (R)
50 Russian Swings
25 Push Press (L)
25 Push Press (R)
50 Russian Swings

This one hits everything.

Your grip starts to go.
Your shoulders start to burn.
Your lungs try to slow you down.

But this is where you decide if you keep moving or not.

Break it up. Stay controlled.
And don’t stare at the clock.

Just keep chipping away.

Comment STRUCTURE and I’ll send you how I build these workouts.

#kettlebelltraining #conditioningworkout #endurance #mentalstrength #LiveForIt

caption.text:
Upper body flow with a purpose 🔥

This is a 20-minute AMRAP—
“As Many Rounds As Possible.”

You’ll cycle through the movements continuously for 20 minutes, keeping rest to a minimum and focusing on clean, controlled reps.

Workout:

2 Kettlebell Halos (Alt)
2 Goblet Front Raise
2 Curl to Triceps Extension

All movements = 1 round.

Your goal:
Keep moving. Stack rounds. Stay controlled.

Don’t sprint out early—find a rhythm you can sustain.

This is where endurance meets strength.
And where your ego gets checked.

📲 Want more follow-along sessions? 300+ kettlebell workouts + full programs inside the KBMH app. Drop “APP” in the comments and I’ll send you the link.

#kettlebelltraining #upperbodystrength #amrapworkout #conditioning #LiveForIt  Kettlebell Workouts by KBMH

caption.text:
Day 24/30

Push through today.
Thank yourself tomorrow.

Most people quit when it gets uncomfortable.
That’s exactly where this starts to pay off.

You’re not chasing motivation—
you’re building discipline.

Do the reps.
Stay consistent.
Keep stacking days.

Future you is built right here.

100 reps. Every day.

Check in: 24/30

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#30DayChallenge #Discipline #Consistency #MentalToughness #LiveForIt

caption.text:
This is why one kettlebell beats a whole gym.

Not because gyms don’t work—
but because most people waste time in them.

One movement:
Clean → Squat → Curl → Press

You’re training your entire body in one sequence.

Legs.
Core.
Upper body.
All working together.

It’s efficient.
It’s effective.
And it actually carries over to real life.

This is why I made the switch.

Less equipment. More results.

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#kettlebelltraining #fullbodyworkout #functionalfitness #strengthtraining #LiveForIt

caption.text:
Day 23/30

You didn’t come this far
to ease up.

You’ve put in the reps.
You’ve built the routine.
You’ve proven you can stay consistent.

Now is not the time to coast.

This is where you lean in.

Stay disciplined.
Stay focused.
Finish strong.

100 reps. Every day.

Check in: 23/30

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#30DayChallenge #Discipline #Consistency #MentalToughness #LiveForIt

caption.text:
How busy parents get ripped 🔥

You don’t need hours.
You need structure.

This is a 24-minute EMOM that hits everything—legs, core, shoulders, conditioning.

EMOM 24 minutes:

Minute 1: 30 sec Goblet Thruster
Minute 2: 30 sec Cossack Goblet Squat (Alt)
Minute 3: 30 sec Russian Swing
Minute 4: 30 sec Around the Slings (Alt)
Minute 5: 30 sec Kettlebell Halos (Alt)
Minute 6: 30 sec Goblet Overhead March

Repeat for 4 rounds.

30 seconds of work.
30 seconds to reset.

That’s it.

No wasted time.
No guesswork.

This is how you build strength and conditioning when life is busy.

📲 Want more follow-along sessions? 300+ kettlebell workouts + full programs inside the KBMH app. Drop “APP” in the comments and I’ll send you the link.

#kettlebelltraining #busyparents #homefitness #fatlossjourney #LiveForIt
 Kettlebell Workouts by KBMH
Check the shorts by Combat Iron Apparel Co.

caption.text:
Imagine doing this… and never having to do sit-ups again.

Because a strong core will always beat “just abs.”

This combo hits everything:

Swing Snatch → Recoil Press → Windmill

3 reps each side
5 rounds
Run it twice a week

You’re building power, stability, and control—all in one flow.

This is how you train your core to actually perform…
not just look good.

Stay controlled. Stay tight. Own every rep.

Comment CORE and I’ll send you the app I use.

#kettlebelltraining #corestrength #functionalfitness #strengthtraining #LiveForIt

caption.text:
Day 22/30

No off switch.
Stay ready.

This isn’t something you turn on and off.

It’s built in the daily reps.
The routine.
The discipline.

You don’t wait to feel ready—
you stay ready.

That’s the difference.

100 reps. Every day.

Stay in it.

Check in: 22/30

Comment MOVES and I’ll send you what I’m using.

#30DayChallenge #Discipline #Consistency #MentalToughness #LiveForIt
